geography: TX — DFW (Dallas/Tarrant/Collin/Denton), Houston (Harris/FortBend/Brazoria/Montgomery), SA (Bexar/Comal), Austin (Travis/Williamson/Hays) + exurban Sun Belt

vertical_notes.spine_strategy: No single TX-wide licensing registry exists for pet boarding (NAICS 812910). Spine assembled from: (1) IBPSA member directory TX filter, (2) PCSA / Pet Care Services Assn TX members, (3) Google Maps 'pet boarding/dog daycare/pet hotel/luxury dog resort [city]' for top metros, (4) cross-checked against TX SOS Comptroller for entity status. Manual franchise/chain exclusion list applied (Camp Bow Wow, Dogtopia, K9 Resorts, Pet Paradise, Best Friends, PetSmart/Petco daycare, Dog Stop multi-loc, Suite Paws chain, Citizen Canine, Hollywood Pet Resort).
recurring_revenue_tells: doggie daycare membership / monthly punch card
coasting_tells: sole owner who is also kennel manager
website pre-2018, no online reservation booking (no Gingr/ProPet/K9-Connect/Time To Pet visible)
no customer portal for vaccination records / report cards
same property since 1990s/2000s, owner-LLC holds deed
no social media or last post >6 months
active_acquirers: Mars Petcare (Best Friends, BluePearl, VCA spinoff)
ETA/search-fund interest HIGH (recurring + real-estate-backed + aging owner)
